positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for growth_stock_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~mature_stock(X0) | suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    bought_for_rapid_profit(sK0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~bought_for_rapid_profit(ko)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~growth_stock(ko)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    suitable_for_retirement_fund(ko)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~growth_stock(X0) | bought_for_rapid_profit(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    growth_stock(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_profit(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    mature_stock(ko)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define stock(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for growth_stock_negative
% SZS output start Proof for growth_stock_negative
1. ! [X0] : (growth_stock(X0) => bought_for_rapid_profit(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (bought_for_rapid_profit(X0) => ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (mature_stock(X0) => suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. mature_stock(ko) [input(axiom)]
7. ~growth_stock(ko) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~growth_stock(ko) [negated conjecture 7]
9. growth_stock(ko) [flattening 8]
12. ! [X0] : (bought_for_rapid_profit(X0) | ~growth_stock(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
13. ! [X0] : (~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_profit(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
14. ! [X0] : (suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~mature_stock(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
17. ~growth_stock(X0) | bought_for_rapid_profit(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
18. ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_profit(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~mature_stock(X0) | suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. mature_stock(ko) [cnf transformation 5]
22. growth_stock(ko) [cnf transformation 9]
23. bought_for_rapid_profit(ko) [resolution 17,22]
25. suitable_for_retirement_fund(ko) [resolution 20,21]
26. ~bought_for_rapid_profit(ko) [resolution 25,18]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,23]
% SZS output end Proof for growth_stock_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
